heading: Omitted
label: 610d Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided that any moneys received by the Swinomish Indian Tribal Community from the sale, exchange, mortgage, or granting of a security interest in tribal land could be used for tribal purposes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–534, § 582 Stat. 884Sept. 28, 1968
